policy: P0 = unsuppressed critical/high in prod runtime deps. P1 = all others (warn, don't fail CI). Items here are accepted-risk dev-build-tool deps — not deployed to CF Pages/Workers.

suppressions.reason: Astro wildcard allowlist bypass — dev build tool only, not deployed. Monitor for patch.
Prototype pollution in defaults — transitive dev dep via Vite/Astro. No user-controlled input in build pipeline.
Prototype pollution in devalue.parse — dev dep via Astro SSR. Static build only, no runtime devalue.parse.
Path traversal via percent-encoded dots — dev dep via Vite dev server. Not exposed in production (CF Pages serves static dist/).
Method injection in POSIX character classes — transitive dev dep via anymatch/micromatch in build tooling only.
XSS via unescaped </style> in CSS stringify — dev dep in Tailwind/build pipeline. No runtime PostCSS.
DoS via thousands of commented lines — dev dep via wrangler. Not processing untrusted TOML at runtime.
DoS via entity expansion (Billion Laughs) — dev dep in Astro SVG processing. No untrusted SVG in build pipeline.
Path traversal in .map file handling — Vite dev server only. Production build served from CF Pages (static dist/), not Vite.
Stack overflow in deeply-nested YAML — transitive dev dep. No untrusted YAML parsing at runtime.
SSE injection via unsanitized newlines — h3 is a transitive dep of Vite/Nitro used only during `npm run dev`. CF Pages serves static dist/, no h3 at runtime.
SSE carriage-return injection (bypass of prior CVE fix) — same scope as GHSA-22cc-p3c6-wpvm above. Dev server only.
Double-decoding path traversal bypass — h3 dev server only, not deployed.
ReDoS via extglob quantifiers — transitive dep via micromatch in build tooling. No user-controlled glob patterns at runtime.
XSS in define:vars — Astro build tool only. We do not use define:vars with untrusted content. Static site, no SSR runtime.
__proto__ emission in devalue — same scope as GHSA-cfw5-2vxh-hr84. Static build only, no runtime devalue.
Arbitrary file read via Vite dev server WebSocket — affects `npm run dev` only. CF Pages serves static dist/ with no Vite process running.
